overview: ORO NOVA — a sovereign cloud intelligence organism with a full Beehive Infrastructure layer for deploying and managing cloud engines as a coordinated colony on ICP.
features: Beehive colony grid with 6 engine class types in a hexagonal visualization
Live engine health metrics from telemetry worker at 873ms intervals
Colony deployment panel for spinning up engine instances
Engine Registry with pre-seeded Worker, Scout, Guard, Builder, Memory, and Governance engines
ICP resource accounting showing cycles consumed per engine class
Sovereign Cognitive Economy view with per-class and aggregate colony economics
